title: athrixia crinita
intro: Athrixia crinita, commonly known as the bushy athrixia or hairy athrixia, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and phenolic compounds in its leaves and stems. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Athrixia crinita can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the dried leaves and stems in hot water, or as a decoction by boiling the plant material in water to release its medicinal compounds.
